creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text: I don't think the patches need to be merged.  Doxygen uses dot (graphics/graphviz) to generate a PDF of a graph.  Then it parses that PDF to extract some information about the size of the graph AFAIU.  Dot uses cairo and newer versions of cairo compress the sections that Doxygen wants to parse.  This is an internal implementation detail.  The patches don't provide anything for users.
